title: Amtech V0250 230mm (9") Segmented diamond cutting disc
features: TOUGH: This segmented diamond cutting disc, suitable for use with 230mm (9") angle grinders, has a tough, sintered diamond construction and is ideal for cutting brick, tile, masonry and stone
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for shrubs, flowers, and soft plant stems
GARDEN ESSENTIAL: A must-have for all types of garden maintenance
LOCKING MECHANISM: Safety lock ensures secure storage after use
SMOOTH ACTION: Spring-loaded for easy repeated cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Disc See more
